extDescription.message: Export Feishu Minutes (飞书妙记) meeting transcripts to Markdown with one click. Automatically uses the meeting name as the filename.

popupEmptyUrlErr.message: Please enter a Feishu Minutes link
popupEmptyUrlErr.description: Error when URL input is empty

popupInvalidUrlErr.message: Invalid URL format. Must be https://xxx.feishu.cn/minutes/xxx
popupInvalidUrlErr.description: Error when URL format is invalid

errNoMeetingLink.description: Alert message when meeting link is missing

errParseToken.description: Alert message when token parsing fails

errNoMenuBtn.description: Alert message when menu button is missing

errMenuTimeout.message: Menu timeout: 'View Minutes' or 'Open Minutes' option not found
errMenuTimeout.description: Alert message when opening menu times out

errTriggerDownload.description: Console error prefix for trigger download

defaultMeetingTitle.description: Default markdown meeting title if none found

errParseTokenBg.message: Failed to parse object_token from URL
errParseTokenBg.description: Error in background script when parsing token fails

errUnrecognizedDomain.description: Error in background script when domain unrecognized

errNoDocxMinutesToken.message: No associated Feishu Minutes card found in document. Please ensure the document contains a Minutes link.
errNoDocxMinutesToken.description: Error when docx API cannot find embedded minutes token
